name: Qwen3 TTS Simple
description: A simple extension package that unlocks text-to-speech canvas nodes and a mock Qwen TTS runtime for end-to-end flow testing.

startupSteps.label: Validate package
startupSteps.description: Check the manifest and required node declarations.

startupSteps.label: Prepare runtime
startupSteps.description: Warm up the bundled mock runtime and runtime metadata.

startupSteps.label: Register nodes
startupSteps.description: Expose the voice nodes to the canvas node catalog.

startupSteps.label: Ready
startupSteps.description: The extension is ready to use in the canvas.
